description_long: This object is a modern assault rifle with a black metal body and a folding skeletonized stock, commonly seen in military and urban tactical scenarios. The rifle features a detachable curved magazine, a prominent handguard with ribbed texturing, and a barrel fitted with a large cylindrical muzzle device, likely a suppressor. The receiver area includes a visible trigger guard and pistol grip, both ergonomically shaped for handling. Iron sights are mounted along the top rail, and the overall finish is matte black, giving it a non-reflective, tactical appearance. The construction appears robust, with most components made from steel or high-strength alloys, and some polymer elements in the grip and handguard. This rifle is designed for portability, rapid deployment, and effective use in close to medium-range urban environments.
description: A black tactical assault rifle with a folding skeletonized stock, detachable curved magazine, and a large suppressor on the barrel. It features iron sights, a ribbed handguard, and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the suppressor and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the folding skeletonized stock, curved magazine, ribbed handguard, and the suppressor attached to the barrel.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the stock and the back of the receiver, with the pistol grip and magazine partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same key features as view 1, including the folding stock, magazine, and suppressor, but from the left side.
